title: Object Types, Interfaces, Aliases, and Structural Compatibility · Compiler Case: Interface Type Alias
summary: Design public service records that evolve without silently accepting misspelled, mutable, or incompatible fields. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts interface type alias increment in an evolvable service-record contract library. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose interface or type alias from extension, unions, declaration merging, diagnostics, and API intent.
Model required, optional, readonly, indexed, and exact-optional property behavior under strict configuration.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
